title: Tender Offers: In a tender offer, what is the significance of the...
summary: Explain the material adverse change clause as a protective withdrawal mechanism in tender offers.
prompt: In a tender offer, what is the significance of the "material adverse change" clause?

options.text: The material adverse change clause allows either party to withdraw from the

solution: The material adverse change clause allows either party to withdraw from the deal if significant adverse changes occur that would impact the deal's value, thus providing a protective measure for both sides.
